functions.name: UpdateNaniteSourceFilename
functions.description: Update the Nanite hi-res source filename.

functions.name: SetNaniteSettings
functions.description: Get the Nanite Settings for the mesh

functions.name: SetLodsWithNotification
functions.description: Remove then add LODs on a static mesh.

functions.name: SetLodScreenSizes
functions.description: Set LOD screen sizes.

functions.name: SetLods
functions.description: Same as SetLodsWithNotification but changes are applied.

functions.name: SetLodReductionSettings
functions.description: Set the LOD reduction for the specified LOD index.

functions.name: SetLODMaterialSlot
functions.description: Sets the material slot for a specific LOD.

functions.name: SetLODGroup
functions.description: Set the LODGroup for the specified static mesh

functions.name: SetLodFromStaticMesh
functions.description: Adds or create a LOD at DestinationLodIndex using the geometry from SourceStaticMesh SourceLodIndex

functions.name: SetLodBuildSettings
functions.description: Set the LOD build options for the specified LOD index.

functions.name: SetGenerateLightmapUVs
functions.description: Set Generate Lightmap UVs for StaticMesh

functions.name: SetConvexDecompositionCollisionsWithNotification
functions.description: Add a convex collision to a static mesh.

functions.name: SetConvexDecompositionCollisions
functions.description: Same as SetConvexDecompositionCollisionsWithNotification but changes are automatically applied.

functions.name: SetAllowCPUAccess
functions.description: Sets StaticMeshFlag bAllowCPUAccess

functions.name: ReplaceMeshComponentsMeshesOnActors
functions.description: Find the references of the mesh MeshToBeReplaced on all the MeshComponents of all the Actors provided and replace it by NewMesh.

functions.name: ReplaceMeshComponentsMeshes
functions.description: Find the references of the mesh MeshToBeReplaced on all the MeshComponents provided and replace it by NewMesh.

functions.name: ReplaceMeshComponentsMaterialsOnActors
functions.description: Find the references of the material MaterialToReplaced on all the MeshComponents of all the Actors provided and replace it by NewMaterial.

functions.name: ReplaceMeshComponentsMaterials
functions.description: Find the references of the material MaterialToReplaced on all the MeshComponents provided and replace it by NewMaterial.

functions.name: RemoveUVChannel
functions.description: Removes the UV channel at the specified channel index on the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: RemoveLods
functions.description: Remove LODs on a static mesh except LOD 0.

functions.name: RemoveCollisionsWithNotification
functions.description: Remove collisions from a static mesh.

functions.name: RemoveCollisions
functions.description: Same as RemoveCollisionsWithNotification but changes are applied.

functions.name: ReimportAllCustomLODs
functions.description: Re-import all the custom LODs present in the specified static mesh.

functions.name: MergeStaticMeshActors
functions.description: Merge the meshes into a unique mesh with the provided StaticMeshActors. There are multiple options on how to merge the meshes and their materials.

functions.name: JoinStaticMeshActors
functions.description: Create a new Actor in the level that contains a duplicate of all the Actors Static Meshes Component.

functions.name: IsSectionVisibleInRayTracingEnabled
functions.description: Checks if a specific LOD mesh section is visible in ray tracing.

functions.name: IsSectionForceOpaqueEnabled
functions.description: Checks if a specific LOD mesh section is forced to be opaque.

functions.name: IsSectionCollisionEnabled
functions.description: Checks if a specific LOD mesh section has collision.

functions.name: IsSectionCastShadowEnabled
functions.description: Checks if a specific LOD mesh section can cast shadows.

functions.name: IsSectionAffectDistanceFieldLightingEnabled
functions.description: Checks if a specific LOD mesh section affects distance field lighting.

functions.name: InsertUVChannel
functions.description: Inserts an empty UV channel at the specified channel index on the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: ImportNaniteHiResMesh
functions.description: Import or re-import the nanite hi-res mesh into the specified base mesh.

functions.name: ImportLOD
functions.description: Import or re-import a LOD into the specified base mesh. If the LOD do not exist it will import it and add it to the base static mesh. If the LOD already exist it will re-import the specified LOD.

functions.name: HasVertexColors
functions.description: Check whether a static mesh has vertex colors

functions.name: HasInstanceVertexColors
functions.description: Check whether a static mesh component has vertex colors

functions.name: GetSimpleCollisionCount
functions.description: Get number of simple collisions present on a static mesh.

functions.name: GetNumUVChannels
functions.description: Returns the number of UV channels for the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: GetNumberVerts
functions.description: Get number of StaticMesh verts for an LOD

functions.name: GetNumberMaterials
functions.description: Get number of Materials for a StaticMesh

functions.name: GetNaniteSourceFilename
functions.description: Get the Nanite hi-res source filename

functions.name: GetNaniteSettings
functions.description: Get the Nanite Settings for the mesh

functions.name: GetLodScreenSizes
functions.description: Get an array of LOD screen sizes for evaluation.

functions.name: GetLodReductionSettings
functions.description: Copy the reduction options with the specified LOD reduction settings.

functions.name: GetLODMaterialSlot
functions.description: Gets the material slot used for a specific LOD section.

functions.name: GetLODGroup
functions.description: Get the LODGroup for the specified static mesh

functions.name: GetLodCount
functions.description: Get number of LODs present on a static mesh.

functions.name: GetLodBuildSettings
functions.description: Copy the build options with the specified LOD build settings.

functions.name: GetConvexCollisionCount
functions.description: Get number of convex collisions present on a static mesh.

functions.name: GetCollisionComplexity
functions.description: Get the Collision Trace behavior of a static mesh

functions.name: GeneratePlanarUVChannel
functions.description: Generates planar UV mapping in the specified UV channel on the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: GenerateCylindricalUVChannel
functions.description: Generates cylindrical UV mapping in the specified UV channel on the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: GenerateBoxUVChannel
functions.description: Generates box UV mapping in the specified UV channel on the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: EnableSectionVisibleInRayTracing
functions.description: Enables/disables mesh section's visibility in ray tracing for a specific LOD.

functions.name: EnableSectionForceOpaque
functions.description: Set/unset mesh section to be forcefully opaque for a specific LOD.

functions.name: EnableSectionCollision
functions.description: Enables/disables mesh section collision for a specific LOD.

functions.name: EnableSectionCastShadow
functions.description: Enables/disables mesh section shadow casting for a specific LOD.

functions.name: EnableSectionAffectDistanceFieldLighting
functions.description: Enables/disables mesh section affects distance field lighting for a specific LOD.

functions.name: CreateProxyMeshActor
functions.description: Build a proxy mesh actor that can replace a set of mesh actors.

functions.name: BulkSetConvexDecompositionCollisionsWithNotification
functions.description: Compute convex collisions for a set of static meshes.

functions.name: BulkSetConvexDecompositionCollisions
functions.description: Same as SetConvexDecompositionCollisionsWithNotification but changes are automatically applied.

functions.name: AddUVChannel
functions.description: Adds an empty UV channel at the end of the existing channels on the given LOD of a StaticMesh.

functions.name: AddSimpleCollisionsWithNotification
functions.description: Add simple collisions to a static mesh.

functions.name: AddSimpleCollisions
functions.description: Same as AddSimpleCollisionsWithNotification but changes are automatically applied.
